# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change in one or two sentences.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Data or metadata
- [ ] Econometric model or diagnostic
- [ ] Figure, dashboard, or publication output
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Reproducibility, CI, or repository maintenance

## Reproducibility Checklist

- [ ] I ran `python tests/test_panel_integrity.py`.
- [ ] I ran `python tests/test_repository_outputs.py`.
- [ ] I ran `python tests/test_publication_readiness.py`.
- [ ] I updated generated outputs when code changes affect them.
- [ ] I did not commit private raw data, credentials, caches, or temporary files.

## Research Checklist

- [ ] I documented any sample, variable, or model change.
- [ ] I avoided unsupported causal language.
- [ ] I reported uncertainty and standard-error assumptions where relevant.

## Notes For Reviewers

List limitations, known issues, or follow-up work.
